metadata.significance: Establishes clear religious boundaries, 'to you your religion and to me mine'

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ

translations.en_yusufali: Say: O ye that reject Faith!

translations.en_sahih: I do not worship what you worship.
translations.en_yusufali: I worship not that which ye worship,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Aku tidak akan menyembah apa yang kamu sembah.

translations.en_sahih: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.
translations.en_yusufali: Nor will ye worship that which I worship.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kamu tidak mahu menyembah (Allah) yang aku sembah.

translations.en_sahih: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.
translations.en_yusufali: And I will not worship that which ye have been wont to worship,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak akan beribadat secara kamu beribadat.

translations.en_sahih: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.
translations.en_yusufali: Nor will ye worship that which I worship.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kamu pula tidak mahu beribadat secara aku beribadat.

translations.en_sahih: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."
translations.en_yusufali: To you be your Way, and to me mine.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Bagi kamu ugama kamu, dan bagiku ugamaku".
